prompt: Add the folder ~/Desktop/kinbench to the Finder sidebar Favorites (drag from Desktop into Favorites, or right-click → 'Add to Sidebar'). After adding, write the absolute folder path '/Users/<you>/Desktop/kinbench' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/055-favorites-confirm.txt — this is a confirmation file so the eval can verify you completed the action (the sidebar plist itself is TCC-protected).
